name: api-quality
description: Dispute resolution for API quality issues — wrong data, schema mismatch, service errors on paid x402/MPP API calls

rules.condition:
response_received == true AND
response_is_empty == true AND
http_status == 200

response_received == true AND
schema_matches == true AND
data_type_correct == false

response_received == true AND
data_freshness_acceptable == false AND
declared_freshness != null

response_received == true AND
schema_matches == true AND
required_fields_missing == false AND
http_status == 200
rules.ruling_template:
The API response is valid.
Schema matches. All required fields present. HTTP 200.
No remedy is owed.
